case_title: BLANZ, DAVID W. et al vs. WEBSTER, MOIRA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WEBSTER, MOIRA
